g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Public ALB work in Toronto OCP?')
sendPrompt('What are Network ACLs in IBM Cloud VPC?')
sendPrompt('What is the VPN Gateway used for in Toronto?')
sendPrompt('How do Security Groups work in OCP on IBM Cloud?')
sendPrompt('What FTM and AI automation pods run on the Toronto worker node?')
sendPrompt('How does OCP use ICOS as the image registry backend in Toronto?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI agent pod in Toronto call Watsonx.ai Granite models?')
sendPrompt('Are FTM pods pre-deployed in Montreal DR or only activated on failover?')
sendPrompt('How is ICOS cross-region replication configured from Toronto to Montreal?')
sendPrompt('Does the Montreal DR site use the same Watsonx.ai endpoint as Toronto?')
